data.title: Cryptocurrency Investment Surge Anticipated by 2025
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Michael Martin, head of the Codebase incubator at Ava Labs, has indicated that a perfect bullish signal storm is set to motivate investors to back cryptocurrency companies. Factors such as Circle's successful public listing, the thriving cryptocurrency market, Stripe's acquisition of Privy, Wall Street's increasing interest in blockchain projects, and new regulations for digital assets are expected to drive more investments in the latter half of the year.

By 2025, venture capital investments in cryptocurrency startups are projected to reach $25 billion. This forecast is echoed by Mike Giampapa of Galaxy Venture.

data.title: Can you split a private key in half? Understanding crypto ownership in divorce and beyond
data.description:

data.title: Vitalik Buterin Highlights Visa's Decentralized Origins and Its Lessons for Web3
data.description:
According to PANews, Vitalik Buterin recently discussed the origins of Visa, noting its initial foundation on decentralized principles. He highlighted that Visa's original intent closely aligns with the modern concept of a Decentralized Autonomous Organization (DAO). However, over time, Visa has come to be viewed by many as an institution that extracts value or acts oppressively. Buterin believes this transformation offers significant insights for the governance and development of Web3 and crypto networks.

The discussion also referenced the concept of a "Chaordic Organization," introduced by Visa's founder, Dee Hock. This idea underscores Visa's early role as a pioneer in decentralized governance and ownership, providing valuable lessons for the cryptocurrency industry to reflect upon and learn from.

data.title: Tagger's Market Cap Reaches New High Amid Significant Growth
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, the market capitalization of Tagger (TAG), an AI data solution platform within the BNB ecosystem, has reached a record high. The current circulating market cap is reported at $105.8 million, marking a 32.9% increase over the past 24 hours. Trading volume has exceeded $3.4 million.

On July 19, WLFI announced an additional purchase of TAG tokens valued at approximately $40,000.

data.title: Ukraine’s central bank sets ‘red lines’ for legalizing crypto
data.description:
The monetary authority of Ukraine is open to legalizing crypto assets, if that doesn’t cross certain “red lines,” its governor has emphasized in statements for Ukrainian media. Using the likes of Bitcoin for payments, for example, is out of the question for the central bank’s top executive. Cryptocurrency transactions should not interfere with martial law […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/ukraine-sets-red-lines-for-legalizing-crypto/

data.title: Jinyong Investment Discloses Ethereum Holdings
data.description: According to Foresight News, Jinyong Investment (01328.HK) has announced its current holdings of Ethereum. As of the announcement date, the group possesses 527.2048 Ethereum tokens. The total cost of these holdings is approximately $1.9585 million, with an average cost of $3,714.91 per Ethereum.

data.title: Canaan Inc. Reports July Bitcoin Production and Strategic Changes
data.description:
According to PANews, Canaan Inc. has announced its Bitcoin production figures for July, revealing a total output of 89 Bitcoins. By the end of the month, the company held a total of 1,511 Bitcoins. Canaan Inc. has completed its exit from mining operations in Kazakhstan and terminated a hosting agreement for a 0.96 EH/s mining machine in South Texas. The equipment is being transferred to a new partner, with approximately 0.50 EH/s expected to be operational again in August.

As of the end of July, Canaan Inc. had deployed a computing power of 7.95 EH/s, with an operational power of 6.24 EH/s. The average electricity cost for the company was reported at $0.042 per kWh. Additionally, Canaan Inc. has officially adopted a long-term Bitcoin holding policy.

data.title: Orderly's Total Value Locked Surpasses $40 Million
data.description: According to Foresight News, Orderly has announced that its total value locked (TVL) has exceeded $40 million. This milestone reflects the platform's growing influence and adoption in the financial technology sector. The increase in TVL indicates a rising level of trust and engagement from users, contributing to Orderly's expanding market presence.
